docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $145.79 FILED BY TSE,DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WAS INADVERTENTLY TAKEN OFF FROM CALENDAR.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-19-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF AUG-29-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY AUTO CENTER, MARTIN CARP SERV ADMINISTRATION: DENIED, COURT DOES NOT FIND HARDSHIP CLAIMED.
INVALID SERVICE AS TO SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE,DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER $75.79 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $114.79, DEFT WAS ENTITLED TO 1 HR. OF CHARGES $70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-29-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF JUL-18-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
